title: LATAM Prior Authorization Automation Gap
problem: Prior authorization in LATAM is manual and slow. Physicians spend hours on paperwork. Faxes sent back and forth. Delays of days/weeks for approval. Patients wait in pain. High denial rates due to paperwork errors. No transparency into approval status. This is a massive administrative burden consuming 15-20% of practice overhead.
solution: Prior authorization automation platform. AI-powered form completion from EMR data. Auto-submission to insurers. Real-time status tracking. Chatbot for common questions. Analytics on denial reasons and payer patterns. Integration with major insurers in Brazil, Mexico, Colombia.
technology: NLP for form completion, API integration with insurers, rule-based automation, chatbot, analytics
target_customer: Physician practices, hospital systems, health insurers (streamline intake)
ai_type: NLP for form completion, denial prediction
traction_signals: Proven models (SamaCare, Cohere Health in US)
regulatory_notes: Insurance regulations vary by country, data sharing with insurers
varden_fit: CRITICAL FIT - Prior auth is the most hated admin process. Automation is pure infrastructure. Reduces costs for practices and insurers. High willingness to pay.
notes: BOREALING: Prior auth automation is incredibly boring. But it's also incredibly valuable. Physicians hate this work. They'll pay to make it go away.
